name: The Machine Shed's Baked Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: Shredded Colby cheese -- fried bacon bits
and/or chopped green onions for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes in water to cover for 1 minute. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large, heavy pot, sauté bacon, onions, and celery over medium-high heat until the celery is tender. Drain any grease and return the bacon, onions, and celery to the pot.
3. Add milk, water, chicken base, salt, and pepper. Heat over medium-high heat until very hot but do not let the soup boil.
4. In a heavy, large saucepan, melt margarine. Stir in flour to make a roux. Mix well and let bubble for 1 minute. If desired, you can make a larger amount of roux for a thicker soup.
5. Gradually add the roux to the soup, stirring constantly. Continue cooking until thick and creamy.
6. Stir in potatoes, parsley, and cream. Serve hot, garnished with cheese, bacon bits, and/or chopped green onions. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
